title: Pocket Space Teleporter
description: This mod provides a teleporter to teleport players to a secure and private pocket space
body:
You can find teleporters in the Tools and Utilities in your CreativeModeTab.

Use it to teleport into your private pocket space anytime, anywhere.

and you can use datapack overrides to make the generated platform your own structure, but the already generated structure will not change, and it is recommended new save or modpack creator to use.

path: data/pocket_space_teleporter/structure/
